introSection: Selva Encantada (Spanish for Enchanted Forest) is a travelling roller coaster built by Italian manufacturer L&T Systems currently owned by Spanish fairground operator Bañuls Atracciones.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: It is a steel wild mouse and has a water section, where the cars travel through a tunnel.

fullText:
Selva Encantada (Spanish for Enchanted Forest) is a travelling roller coaster built by Italian manufacturer L&T Systems currently owned by Spanish fairground operator Bañuls Atracciones.

It is a steel wild mouse and has a water section, where the cars travel through a tunnel.




 * Trip report from Richard Bannister
